tests.name: tests/model/test_model_validation.py::test_valid_patient_high_risk
tests.error:
Got: {'risk_level': 'medium', 'error': {'history': 'Missing history data'}}
assert 'medium' == 'high'
  
  [0m[91m- high[39;49;00m[90m[39;49;00m
  [92m+ medium[39;49;00m[90m[39;49;00m

tests.name: tests/model/test_model_validation.py::test_invalid_age_type_returns_error
tests.error:
Expected error or unknown risk_level, got: {'risk_level': 'medium', 'reason': 'age between 40–60 with minor symptoms'}
assert ('medium' == 'unknown'
  
  [0m[91m- unknown[39;49;00m[90m[39;49;00m
  [92m+ medium[39;49;00m[90m[39;49;00m or 'error' in {'reason': 'age between 40–60 with minor symptoms', 'risk_level': 'medium'})

tests.name: tests/model/test_model_validation.py::test_missing_history_field_returns_error

Expected validation error for missing 'history', got: {'risk_level': 'high', 'reason': 'chest pain detected'}
assert ('high' == 'unknown'
  
  [0m[91m- unknown[39;49;00m[90m[39;49;00m

tests.name: tests/model/test_model_validation.py::test_string_age_returns_type_error
tests.error:
Got: {'risk_level': 'medium', 'reason': 'age 52 with minor symptoms (fatigue), no critical symptoms, and no history provided'}
assert ('medium' == 'unknown'
  
  [0m[91m- unknown[39;49;00m[90m[39;49;00m
  [92m+ medium[39;49;00m[90m[39;49;00m or 'Invalid data type' in '')
 +  where '' = str('')
 +    where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x000001FFFCCE6F00>('error', '')
 +      where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x000001FFFCCE6F00> = {'reason': 'age 52 with minor symptoms (fatigue), no critical symptoms, and no history provided', 'risk_level': 'medium'}.get

tests.name: tests/model/test_model_validation.py::test_string_age_returns_type_error
tests.error:
Got: {'risk_level': 'medium', 'reason': 'age between 40–60 with minor symptoms (fatigue), chest pain not detected, and history missing.'}
assert ('medium' == 'unknown'
  
  - unknown
  + medium or 'Invalid data type' in '')
 +  where '' = str('')
 +    where '' = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x0000022C22EBCE80>('error', '')
 +      where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x0000022C22EBCE80> = {'risk_level': 'medium', 'reason': 'age between 40\u201360 with minor symptoms (fatigue), chest pain not detected, and history missing.'}.get

tests.name: tests/model/test_model_validation.py::test_string_symptoms_instead_of_list_returns_type_error
tests.error:
Got: {'risk_level': 'medium', 'error': {'history': 'history field is missing'}}
assert ('medium' == 'unknown'
  
  - unknown
  + medium or 'Invalid data type' in "{'history': 'history field is missing'}")
 +  where "{'history': 'history field is missing'}" = str({'history': 'history field is missing'})
 +    where {'history': 'history field is missing'} = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x0000022C22ECCDC0>('error', '')
 +      where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x0000022C22ECCDC0> = {'risk_level': 'medium', 'error': {'history': 'history field is missing'}}.get
